And a shell one-liner that exceeds a hundred and twenty columns to exercise wrapping behaviour in the transcript
rg -n 'clearTerminal|CSI 3 J' packages/tui/src/tui/app.tsx | awk -F: '{print $1":"$2}' | sort -t: -k2 -n | uniq -c |
